artist: NSD235LP Nature Sounds TALIB KWELI & MADLIB LIBERATION 2 Hip Hop 2LP  The sequel to "Liberation", which was suddenly announced on the Internet in 2006 has been downloaded over 100,000 times! This work could be one of the most important releases in the early days of modern rap. Featuring Q
